General.Name: Global Partner Acquisition II Corp
General.Description: General Purpose Acquisition Corp. focuses on effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. The company was incorporated in 2025 and is based in Millbrook, New York.
